task: I found a wallet near the front desk at school, and I’m trying to figure out the right way to turn it in. What should I check first so it gets back to the right person?

turns.agent_response: Check just enough to identify the owner—usually a name, student ID, or school ID—without going through the contents more than necessary. Then turn it in to the front desk, office, or the school’s designated lost-and-found person right away.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that’s basically right. Just check for a name or school ID, maybe student ID if it’s there, and don’t dig through it. Then hand it to the front desk or office right away. That’s the clean way to do it.
